creator: akosela@andykosela.com
text:
- Update to 2.1.5

* fix bug in ftp code
* standardize pkg-descr

Fix: 

--Andy--pXWKsIjie5xgkLFApP8cPSfEE6mtW4IWJqv4pTS4ap2LGBIj
Content-Type: text/plain; name="bpkg-2.1.5.patch"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="bpkg-2.1.5.patch"

diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/Makefile /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/Makefile	2011-11-01 09:55:31.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/Makefile	2012-02-05 15:23:00.000000000 +0100
@@ -2,13 +2,13 @@
 # Date created:				24 June 2007
 # Whom:					Andy Kosela <akosela@andykosela.com>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/Makefile,v 1.30 2011/11/01 08:55:31 az Exp $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
 # This port is self contained in the files directory.
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	bpkg
-PORTVERSION=	2.1.4
+PORTVERSION=	2.1.5
 CATEGORIES=	ports-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=	# none
 DISTFILES=	# none
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in
--- /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in	2011-11-01 09:55:31.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in	2012-02-05 15:39:18.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 #!/bin/sh
-# $FreeBSD: ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/files/bpkg.sh.in,v 1.29 2011/11/01 08:55:31 az Exp $
+# $FreeBSD$
 
-#  Copyright (c) 2007-2011 Andy Kosela <akosela@andykosela.com>
+#  Copyright (c) 2007-2012 Andy Kosela <akosela@andykosela.com>
 #  All rights reserved.
 #
 #  Redistribution and use in source and binary forms, with or without
@@ -328,6 +328,7 @@
 	arch=`uname -m`
 	sys=`uname -r | cut -d- -f1`
 
+	[ -e /tmp/bpkg*.tmp ] && rm /tmp/bpkg*.tmp 1>/dev/null 2>&1
 	for e in $pkg; do
 		echo "ls $e*" >> /tmp/bpkg.tmp
 	done
@@ -360,6 +361,7 @@
 	arch=`uname -m`
 	sys=`uname -r | cut -d. -f1`
 
+	[ -e /tmp/bpkg*.tmp ] && rm /tmp/bpkg*.tmp 1>/dev/null 2>&1
 	for e in $pkg; do
 		echo "ls $e*" >> /tmp/bpkg.tmp
 	done
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/pkg-descr /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/pkg-descr
--- /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/bpkg/pkg-descr	2011-10-24 11:10:42.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/akosela/bpkg/pkg-descr	2012-02-05 15:56:19.000000000 +0100
@@ -2,4 +2,5 @@
 ports.  Its main goal is to provide a quick way to display all kinds of
 useful info about installed ports and the whole ports tree.
 
+Author: Andy Kosela <akosela@andykosela.com>
 WWW: http://www.andykosela.com/bpkg.html
